author: gb9t
content: Iter 104 result: net/netlink/genetlink.md (Generic netlink multiplexer - genetlink.c ~1996 lines; per-family registration genl_register_family with id+name+version+ops[]+mcgrps[]+policy + per-cmd dispatch with GENL_ADMIN_PERM CAP-check + nlmsg_parse policy validation + per-cmd doit/dumpit/start/done callbacks + per-family pre_doit/post_doit hooks + per-family parallel_ops mutex gating + per-mcast multicast group with global mc_group_idr offset + GENL_ID_CTRL nlctrl family CTRL_CMD_GETFAMILY/NEWFAMILY/DELFAMILY) + virt/kvm/x86-posted-intr.md (Intel VT-d Posted Interrupts - posted_intr.c 319 lines; per-vCPU 64-byte PiDesc with PIR 256-bit pending-vector bitmap + control with ON+SN+NV+NDST + POSTED_INTR_VECTOR 0xF2 in-guest notification + POSTED_INTR_WAKEUP_VECTOR 0xF1 host wakeup ISR + pi_pre_block/post_block sleep-transition + pi_wakeup_handler per-CPU walking pi_wakeup_list + vmx_pi_update_irte for VFIO-assigned IRQ direct-posting via IOMMU IRTE.posted=1). NOTE: x86-mtrr.md already existed; pivoted to x86-posted-intr.md. 158 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/netlink/policy.md (NLA policy validation) + virt/kvm/x86-tsc-scaling.md (TSC scaling for live migration).
